name: g60_first_explicit_patch_schema_v0_1
purpose: Schema for the first explicit chamber-centered local G60 patch supporting chart-relative framed readout.

carrier_id.description: Unique identifier of the local carrier.

chart_id.description: Identifier for the local chart choice.

chart_orientation.description: Human-readable description of the local orientation convention.

chart_order.description: Ordered local frame data used to interpret continuations.

incoming_id.description: Identifier of the incoming oriented incidence.

incoming_orientation.description: Orientation label of the incoming local incidence.

continuation_types.description: Map from continuation id to continuation type.

continuation_orientations.description: Map from continuation id to local orientation descriptor.

left_like_ids.description: Continuations read as chart-left-like in the chosen chart.

right_like_ids.description: Continuations read as chart-right-like in the chosen chart.

partition_note.description: Optional note describing why the partition is valid.

reversal_pairs.description: Pairs of continuation ids exchanged or compared under local chart reversal.

chart_flip_action.description: Description of how the local chart reversal acts on continuation classes.

adjacent_carrier_ids.description: Nearby carriers needed for a first short framed return test.

short_path_candidates.description: Candidate short local paths for framed return or parity/displacement tests.

chart_relative_exit.description: Whether the patch supports a chart-relative continuation readout.

parity_like_quantity.description: Whether the patch is rich enough to define a first parity-like local quantity.

displacement_like_quantity.description: Whether the patch is rich enough to define a first displacement-like local quantity.

success_condition.value: A valid first patch instantiation exhibits one carrier, one incoming oriented incidence, at least two locally distinct continuations, a chart-relative left/right-like partition, and a visible chart-flip effect.

framed_partition.partition_note: Stub only; replace with actual G60 local readout.

local_reversal_data.chart_flip_action: swap left-like and right-like continuation classes
